meaning: <英>vt.(尤指考试不及格后)再参加(考试);vi.(考试不及格后)再考,重考
examples: Students are only allowed one resit.
Those who fail can resit the exam in 60 days.
She has to resit her maths exam next term.
The news comes as more than 45, 000 pupils prepare to resit their GCSE English exams.
Instead, students will be given an extra chance to resit the GCSE next month.
